creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #2)

Thanks for the info.
However, I build the modules myself with Poudriere, so they've always been built "for 14.2".
I guess the upgrade from 2025Q1 to 2025Q2 should not change anything in my case, then; should it?

In the meantime I've been using drm-515 instead of drm-61 and I never experienced any issue.
Since these were not systematic (though frequent) and I've not been using the laptop that much lately, I was waiting to be more confident before reporting.
